channel.title: Auditing on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Auditing on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Least privilege for AI agents: Identity, access, and tool binding
item.description:
Microsoft Security published a post on applying least-privilege principles to AI agents, focusing on identity, access control, tool binding, and auditing as agents become more autonomous.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Microsoft Purview sensitivity label auditing in Azure AI Search
item.description:
Azure AI Search in public preview now emits audit events for Microsoft Purview sensitivity labels that are carried with indexed documents. This applies when the SharePoint in Microsoft 365 indexer is set to preserve and honor labels, and it records query-time filtering decisions and related label activity.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Purview admin access auditing for sensitivity-labeled content in Azure AI Search
item.description:
Azure AI Search now has Microsoft Purview admin access auditing for sensitivity-labeled content in public preview. Admin operations affecting Purview-labeled documents in Azure AI Search, knowledge retrieval, and Foundry IQ knowledge bases are audited.

  • Source: Azure Updates
